title: chloraea volucris
intro: Chloraea volucris, also known as the Native Spider Orchid, is a species of orchid native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Chloraea volucris include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Chloraea volucris can be prepared as an herbal remedy through various methods, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
